_description: Maps postcodes to their collection day and zone. Add more by looking up postcodes on newrymournedown.org/weekly-bin-collection-and-calendar
_zoneNaming: Zone numbers (e.g. Z2) are shared across days. The ref is DAY + ZONE (e.g. TUES Z2, WED Z2 are different schedules sharing zone Z2). V prefix used for Thursday.
